examples.title: Clean up dense math expressions
examples.description: `using static` can make formulas and constant-heavy code easier to scan when the containing type is obvious from context.

examples.title: Import a focused helper API
examples.description: The feature also works with your own static helper classes, which can make validation or DSL-like code read more naturally.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with Expression-bodied members when you want an earlier building block for using static.
